form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months raced on the speed throughout before fading 12th of 14 at this track on March 24 over 1200m, 16 len behind Listeia One with 56kg at $29.10. Previously second-up 3rd of 10 at this track on October 21 over 1200m, 9 len behind Sugarvine carrying 53kg at $12.60. Needs to do a lot more.
